label: CMake: Configure (Clang)
command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Import-Module 'C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/Common7/Tools/Microsoft.VisualStudio.DevShell.dll'; Enter-VsDevShell -VsInstallPath 'C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community' -SkipAutomaticLocation -Arch amd64 -HostArch amd64; cmake --preset zed-clang"

label: Build: All
command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Import-Module 'C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/Common7/Tools/Microsoft.VisualStudio.DevShell.dll'; Enter-VsDevShell -VsInstallPath 'C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community' -SkipAutomaticLocation -Arch amd64 -HostArch amd64; cmake --build --preset zed-clang"

label: Build: shaderTest
command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Import-Module 'C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/Common7/Tools/Microsoft.VisualStudio.DevShell.dll'; Enter-VsDevShell -VsInstallPath 'C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community' -SkipAutomaticLocation -Arch amd64 -HostArch amd64; cmake --build --preset zed-clang --target shaderTest"

label: Build: app
command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Import-Module 'C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/Common7/Tools/Microsoft.VisualStudio.DevShell.dll'; Enter-VsDevShell -VsInstallPath 'C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community' -SkipAutomaticLocation -Arch amd64 -HostArch amd64; cmake --build --preset zed-clang --target app"
